title: GPT-3 powers the next generation of apps
titleZh: GPT-3为下一代应用提供支持
summary: Over 300 applications are delivering GPT-3–powered search, conversation, text completion, and other advanced AI features through our API.
summaryZh: 超过300个应用程序通过我们的API提供GPT-3支持的搜索、对话、文本完成和其他高级AI功能。
highlights: Over 300 applications are delivering GPT-3–powered search, conversation, text completion, and other advanced AI features through our API.
highlightsZh: 超过300个应用程序通过我们的API提供GPT-3支持的搜索、对话、文本完成和其他高级AI功能。

title: Multimodal neurons in artificial neural networks
titleZh: 人工神经网络中的多模态神经元
summary: We’ve discovered neurons in CLIP that respond to the same concept whether presented literally, symbolically, or conceptually. This may explain CLIP’s accuracy in classifying surprising visual renditions of concepts, and is also an important step toward understanding the associations and biases that CLIP and similar mod
summaryZh: 我们在剪辑中发现了响应相同概念的神经元，无论是从字面上、象征上还是概念上呈现。这可以解释CLIP对概念的令人惊讶的视觉再现进行分类的准确性，也是理解CLIP和类似MOD的关联和偏见的重要一步
